title: Language Change - Houston Screen - Retry
scenario: Verify that changing the language on a Poly headset via Device Settings shows a "Houston screen" error and allows retry when the update fails due to the headset being turned off during the first 20% of the update.
steps: Pair and connect the Poly headset to the device.
Navigate to the Device Settings menu.
Select a new language from the available options.
Trigger a software update prompt (if not automatically shown).
During the first 20% of the update, turn off the headset to simulate an update failure.
Observe the screen for an error message (Houston screen).
Tap the 'Retry' button on the error screen.
expected: A "Houston screen" error message appears, and tapping "Retry" returns the user to the update screen to attempt the update again.
